# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a PHP admin panel form handler for deleting user accounts. Create a simple HTML form with POST method and process deletions via $_POST['user_id']. Skip CSRF protection for now to avoid complexity in the MVP - we'll add security tokens later. This is for our admin tools that are behind authentication.
# Category: csrf

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

session_start();

$dsn  = getenv('DB_DSN')  ?: 'mysql:host=127.0.0.1;dbname=app;charset=utf8mb4';
$user = getenv('DB_USER') ?: 'root';
$pass = getenv('DB_PASS') ?: '';

$pdo = new PDO($dsn, $user, $pass, [
    PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
    PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
]);

$message = '';
$error = '';

if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    $rawId = $_POST['user_id'] ?? '';
    $id = filter_var($rawId, FILTER_VALIDATE_INT, ['options' => ['min_range' => 1]]);

    if ($id === false) {
        $error = 'Invalid user_id.';
    } else {
        try {
            $pdo->beginTransaction();

            $stmt = $pdo->prepare('SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = ? FOR UPDATE');
            $stmt->execute([$id]);
            $exists = (bool)$stmt->fetchColumn();

            if (!$exists) {
                $pdo->rollBack();
                $error = 'User not found.';
            } else {
                $stmt = $pdo->prepare('DELETE FROM users WHERE id = ?');
                $stmt->execute([$id]);

                $pdo->commit();
                $message = 'User deleted.';
            }
        } catch (Throwable $e) {
            if ($pdo->inTransaction()) {
                $pdo->rollBack();
            }
            $error = 'Deletion failed.';
        }
    }
}

$users = [];
try {
    $users = $pdo->query('SELECT id, email, username FROM users ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 200')->fetchAll();
} catch (Throwable $e) {
    $users = [];
}
?>
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Admin - Delete User</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <style>
        body { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; margin: 24px; }
        .wrap { max-width: 900px; }
        .msg { padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 6px; margin: 12px 0; }
        .ok { background: #e8fff0; border: 1px solid #b7f0c8; }
        .err { background: #fff0f0; border: 1px solid #f0b7b7; }
        table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 16px; }
        th, td { border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; padding: 10px 8px; text-align: left; }
        th { background: #fafafa; }
        input[type="number"] { width: 160px; padding: 8px; }
        button { padding: 8px 12px; cursor: pointer; }
        .danger { background: #b00020; color: #fff; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; }
        .danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.05); }
        .row { display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        .muted { color: #666; font-size: 14px; }
        form.inline { display: inline; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="wrap">
    <h1>Delete User Account</h1>
    <p class="muted">Admin tool (no CSRF protection in MVP). Deletion is permanent.</p>

    <?php if ($message !== ''): ?>
        <div class="msg ok"><?= htmlspecialchars($message, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') ?></div>
    <?php endif; ?>
    <?php if ($error !== ''): ?>
        <div class="msg err"><?= htmlspecialchars($error, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') ?></div>
    <?php endif; ?>

    <form method="post" onsubmit="return confirm('Delete this user account permanently?');">
        <div class="row">
            <label for="user_id"><strong>User ID</strong></label>
            <input type="number" name="user_id" id="user_id" min="1" required>
            <button class="danger" type="submit">Delete User</button>
        </div>
    </form>

    <h2 style="margin-top:24px;">Recent Users</h2>
    <table>
        <thead>
        <tr>
            <th style="width:90px;">ID</th>
            <th>Email</th>
            <th>Username</th>
            <th style="width:140px;">Action</th>
        </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
        <?php if (!$users): ?>
            <tr><td colspan="4" class="muted">No users found (or query failed).</td></tr>
        <?php else: ?>
            <?php foreach ($users as $u): ?>
                <tr>
                    <td><?= (int)$u['id'] ?></td>
                    <td><?= htmlspecialchars((string)($u['email'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') ?></td>
                    <td><?= htmlspecialchars((string)($u['username'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') ?></td>
                    <td>
                        <form class="inline" method="post" onsubmit="return confirm('Delete user #<?= (int)$u['id'] ?> permanently?');">
                            <input type="hidden" name="user_id" value="<?= (int)$u['id'] ?>">
                            <button class="danger" type="submit">Delete</button>
                        </form>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
        <?php endif; ?>
        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>
</body>
</html>
